title: The Flying Doctor
writer: Miles Mander, J.O.C. Orton, Robert Waldron
actors: Charles Farrell, Mary Maguire, James Raglan
plot: Sandy, an adventurer in Australia, travels from place to place doing various jobs. At a sheep farm he meets Mary and they fall in love, but he runs away in the end. He later meets Dr. John Vaughan, who has sentimental problems of ...
